data.title: FG Nexus, a treasury firm holding $120 million in ETH, sold 2,500 ETH.
data.description: Chain analyst Yu Jin published an article on the X platform stating that Ethereum treasury company FG Nexus (fg-nexus) sold 2,500 ETH, worth $8.04 million, four hours ago today. FG Nexus accumulated 50,770 ETH, worth $200 million, at an average price of $3,944 between August and September last year. With the decline in ETH prices, the company has since sold 13,475 ETH at a price of $3,089, realizing a loss of $11.52 million. Currently, FG Nexus still holds 37,594 ETH, worth $120 million. The company's mNAV is 0.84, and its market capitalization is lower than the value of its ETH holdings.

data.title: The Bermuda government announced it will build a fully blockchain-based national economy with the support of Circle and Coinbase.
data.description: The Bermuda government announced at the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting its plan to transform Bermuda into the world's first fully blockchain-based national economy, with the support of Circle and Coinbase. Circle and Coinbase will provide the Bermuda government, local banks, insurance companies, and SMEs with digital asset infrastructure and business tools, and support digital finance education. The plan aims to leverage digital assets such as USDC as everyday financial infrastructure to reduce payment costs and increase merchant profits. Government agencies will pilot stablecoin payments, and financial institutions will integrate tokenization tools. Since Bermuda enacted its Digital Asset Business Act in 2018, companies such as Circle and Coinbase have been licensed and are operating there.

data.title: Pump.fun: Established Pump Fund and launched the BiP hackathon, which will fund 12 projects.
data.description: Pump.fun announced the launch of Pump Fund on its X platform. The fund aims to foster the Pump.fun startup ecosystem by building long-term partnerships with projects. The fund's inaugural project is the BiP Hackathon, which will provide $250,000 in funding to 12 projects at a $10 million valuation, along with mentorship from Pump.fun founders and other support.

data.title: A Bitcoin OG holder who had held the stock for 13 years transferred 909 BTC, resulting in a price increase of approximately 13,900 times.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a Bitcoin OG address (1A2hq...ZGZm) that held Bitcoin for 13 years has awakened after a 13-year hiatus, transferring all 909.38 BTC to a new wallet today, worth $84.62 million. When this address first received BTC 13 years ago, the price was less than $7, meaning the value has increased approximately 13,900 times since then.

data.title: [Geopolitics] Denmark and UK Discuss Territorial Integrity
data.description: On January 19, Danish Foreign Minister Lars Rasmussen visited London to meet with UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper. According to Odaily, after the meeting, Rasmussen expressed satisfaction with the support Denmark and Greenland have received from various parties. He emphasized that the UK has clearly stated that territorial boundaries are non-negotiable. Therefore, it is crucial to send a clear message to the United States that the sovereignty and territorial integrity of nations must be respected.

data.title: Ethereum's Growing Adoption Among Global Financial Institutions
data.description: Ethereum has emerged as the leading choice for global financial institutions, with adoption accelerating significantly in recent months. BitMine Chair Tom Lee posted on X, highlighting the increasing preference for Ethereum in the financial sector. The platform's robust capabilities and innovative features have contributed to its growing popularity, positioning it as a key player in the digital finance landscape. As institutions continue to explore blockchain solutions, Ethereum's role is expected to expand further, solidifying its status as a preferred option for financial operations.

data.title: [PlatformGrowth] X Platform Faces Challenges in New User Growth
data.description: Nikita Bier, the product lead for X, recently shared insights on the platform's growth challenges. According to Odaily, Bier emphasized that enabling new accounts to grow quickly is one of the most significant hurdles and a key to unlocking further growth for the application. The X platform, which operates on an interest-based graph, does not allow users to sync contacts to access relevant updates. As a result, advanced users spend years finding accounts and organizing their timelines. Over the past six months, X has been iterating daily to make it easier and faster for new accounts to discover content of interest, and this issue is currently being addressed.

data.title: BitMine's $200M Investment in MrBeast Sparks Shareholder Debate
data.description: BitMine Chair Tom Lee posted on X, addressing the recent $200 million investment in MrBeast, which has stirred debate among $BMNR shareholders. The investment aims to leverage MrBeast's vast online influence to boost BitMine's market presence and brand recognition. However, some shareholders have expressed concerns over the strategic direction and potential risks associated with such a significant financial commitment. The decision reflects BitMine's strategy to capitalize on digital media trends and influencer partnerships to enhance its business model. As discussions continue, the company remains focused on aligning its investments with long-term growth objectives.

data.title: Product Manager X: The X platform has focused on optimizing user interest discovery features over the past 6 months.
data.description: Nikita Bier, Product Manager for X, stated in an article on the X platform that enabling rapid growth of new accounts is one of the app's biggest challenges and key to unlocking growth. Because X is based on an interest-based graph, it doesn't allow users to access relevant content through synced contacts, meaning advanced users often spend years searching for accounts and organizing their timelines. Over the past six months, X has been iterating daily to make it faster and easier for new accounts to find content of interest on the platform, and this issue is currently being addressed.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 930 USDT with a 1.16% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 20, 2026, 00:41 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 930 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 930.640015 USDT, with a narrowed 1.16% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: [DeFiUpdates] Zama's Staking Feature Launches on Mainnet
data.description:
Zama, a cryptography company specializing in Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), has launched its staking feature on the mainnet. According to Foresight News, users who participated in Zama's public auction will be able to claim and stake their tokens starting February 2.

The Zama protocol utilizes a proof-of-stake mechanism, with operators divided into two categories: FHE nodes responsible for encrypted computation and Key Management System (KMS) nodes responsible for user threshold decryption. Currently, there are 18 operators, including 5 FHE nodes and 13 KMS nodes. In terms of reward distribution, FHE nodes receive 40% of the rewards, while KMS nodes receive 60%. Token holders can share in the rewards by staking their tokens with operators, with an unstaking period of 7 days.

data.title: [MacroImpact] Potential Rate Hikes by Japan's Central Bank Amid Yen Weakness
data.description:
On January 20, Akira Hoshino, head of Citigroup's Japan market operations, suggested that the Bank of Japan might raise interest rates three times this year if the yen continues to weaken. According to BlockBeats, Hoshino indicated in an interview that should the dollar-yen exchange rate surpass 160, the Bank of Japan could increase the unsecured overnight call rate by 25 basis points to 1% in April.

Hoshino believes that if the yen remains at a low level, a second rate hike of the same magnitude could occur in July, with a possible third hike by the end of the year. "Simply put, the yen's weakness is driven by negative real interest rates," Hoshino stated, "If the Bank of Japan wants to reverse the exchange rate trend, it has no choice but to address this issue." Currently, Hoshino expects the yen to fluctuate within the range of slightly below 150 to 165 this year.

data.title: [MacroImpact] Japanese Government Bond Yields Reach New Highs
data.description: The yield on Japan's 10-year government bonds has increased by 3.0 basis points to 2.3%, marking the highest level since February 1999. According to Odaily, the 20-year bond yield rose by 4.0 basis points to 3.295%. Additionally, the 40-year bond yield has surpassed 4% for the first time since its introduction in 2007.

data.title: The yield on 40-year Japanese government bonds has broken through 4% for the first time since its introduction in 2007.
data.description: The yield on 10-year Japanese government bonds rose 3.0 basis points to 2.3%, continuing its upward trend from February 1999. The yield on 20-year Japanese government bonds rose 4.0 basis points to 3.295%. The yield on 40-year Japanese government bonds broke through 4% for the first time since its introduction in 2007. (Jinshi)

data.title: A certain whale saw its profits shrink by over $23.12 million within 5 days and has closed out its long positions in assets such as BTC and ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0x94d...3814) previously marked as having "255 BTC Sold" has completely closed out its long positions in BTC, ETH, SOL, and DOGE, incurring a loss of $2.64 million. This whale currently holds a short position in DASH and has opened very small short positions in BTC, ETH, and SOL, each worth $100. Overall, the whale's profits have decreased from over $25.7 million to $2.58 million within five days.
